title: [ESI] Add ValidOnly channel signaling protocol
body:
Add support for a ValidOnly signaling protocol for ESI channels. This is a fire-and-forget protocol with a valid signal but no ready backpressure.

- Add ChannelSignaling::ValidOnly enum (value 2) in TableGen
- Add WrapValidOnlyOp (esi.wrap.vo) and UnwrapValidOnlyOp (esi.unwrap.vo) operations, both using InferTypeOpInterface
- Implement canonicalization (dangling wrap erasure, wrap-unwrap merging)
- Add ValidOnly signaling class in ESILowerPorts (data+valid, no ready)
- Handle ValidOnly in ESILowerPhysical (buffer boundary conversion to/from ValidReady, FIFO input/output support)
- Handle ValidOnly in ESILowerToHW (null source, wrap/unwrap elimination as 4 separate OpConversionPatterns, snoop.xact where transaction=valid)
- Convert non-ValidReady channels to ValidReady in cosim services
- Update PyCDE types.py and signals.py (unwrap, snoop, transform, fork)
- Add Python ChannelSignaling.ValidOnly = 2 in bindings
- Add MLIR tests for round-trip, canonicalization, errors, and all lowering passes (physical, ports, HW)
- Add PyCDE test for ValidOnly channel transform
